name: deck.gl
when_to_use: 需要在坐标(经纬度或任意 x/y)上叠加大规模数据层——OD 弧线、点密度六边形/网格聚合、轨迹路径——且不想要真地图瓦片时用它(可无底图,只画数据层);少量点用现有 Chart.js/Plotly 即可,不必上 deck。
why_valuable: 原生 AI 手写 SVG/Canvas 在几万点以上就卡死;deck.gl 用 WebGL/GPU 实例化渲染百万级点/线/多边形并支持 hover/pick 拾取,内置 HexagonLayer/HeatmapLayer/GridLayer/ArcLayer 做 GPU 空间聚合(海量坐标聚成六边形/网格再统计),这类 GPU 聚合+拾取原生根本写不动。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to overlay large-scale data layers on coordinates, whether longitude/latitude or arbitrary x/y, such as OD arcs, point-density hexagon/grid aggregation, or trajectory paths, without real map tiles. It can render only the data layers with no basemap. For a small number of points, existing Chart.js/Plotly is enough; deck is unnecessary.
en.why_valuable: Hand-written SVG/Canvas from AI stalls above tens of thousands of points. deck.gl uses WebGL/GPU instancing to render millions of points, lines, or polygons with hover/pick support, and includes HexagonLayer/HeatmapLayer/GridLayer/ArcLayer for GPU spatial aggregation, such as grouping massive coordinate sets into hexagons or grids before summarizing them. Native AI cannot implement this combination of GPU aggregation and picking.

data_in.note: deck is accessor-driven: field names are determined by callbacks such as getPosition and getSourcePosition, so the schema fixes one conventional row shape. Crucially, new Deck attaches its canvas to parent||document.body, so parent must be supplied as a container div; in a widget, pass a container inside shadowRoot. Without a basemap, use initialViewState to provide the longitude/latitude or orthographic view directly.

schema.initialViewState: { longitude:number, latitude:number, zoom:number, pitch?:number, bearing?:number } - viewport; without a basemap, this can still position the data layers alone
schema.points: [{ position:[lng,lat] | [x,y], radius?:number, color?:[r,g,b], weight?:number }] - data for ScatterplotLayer/HexagonLayer/HeatmapLayer/GridLayer, with coordinates read by getPosition:d=>d.position
schema.arcs?: [{ from:[lng,lat], to:[lng,lat], color?:[r,g,b] }] - ArcLayer data, with endpoints read by getSourcePosition/getTargetPosition
schema.layerType?: 'scatterplot'|'hexagon'|'heatmap'|'grid'|'arc'|'line'|'path'|'geojson' - select the layer, corresponding to the named *Layer exports

spec.note: deck absolutely positions its canvas inside the parent container. The container needs an explicit px height and position:relative; do not use vh or percentage heights. WebGL2 must be supported by the host.

data_in.note: deck 是 accessor 驱动:字段名由 getPosition/getSourcePosition 等回调决定,schema 只钉一套惯用行形。关键:new Deck 的 canvas 会挂到 parent||document.body——必须传 parent(容器 div,widget 内传 shadowRoot 内的容器)。无底图时用 initialViewState 直接给经纬度/正交视图。

schema.initialViewState: { longitude:number, latitude:number, zoom:number, pitch?:number, bearing?:number } —— 视口;无底图也可用此仅定位数据层
schema.points: [{ position:[lng,lat] | [x,y], radius?:number, color?:[r,g,b], weight?:number }] —— ScatterplotLayer/HexagonLayer/HeatmapLayer/GridLayer 的 data,由 getPosition:d=>d.position 取坐标
schema.arcs?: [{ from:[lng,lat], to:[lng,lat], color?:[r,g,b] }] —— ArcLayer,由 getSourcePosition/getTargetPosition 取端点
schema.layerType?: 'scatterplot'|'hexagon'|'heatmap'|'grid'|'arc'|'line'|'path'|'geojson' —— 选层(对应 named 导出的 *Layer)

spec.note: deck 绝对定位 canvas 于 parent 容器;容器须显式 px 高 + position:relative,禁用 vh/百分比高。WebGL2 需宿主支持。

example._why: deck 是 accessor 驱动,minimal 钉死 position:[lng,lat] 的行形与 getPosition:d=>d.position 的取法。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;hover/pick 拾取信息若需外传,由消费 AI 直接接 Layer 的 onHover/onClick 或 Deck 的 getTooltip 回调并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: supported:+esm,parent 传 shadowRoot 内容器把 WebGL canvas 收进 shadow;核心 Deck 不注入 head CSS(仅 @deck.gl/widgets 才注,默认不加载)
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + WebGL,无 worker/uplink 硬依赖(WebGL2 需宿主支持)

isolation.evidence: +esm 具名导出 {Deck,DeckGL,ScatterplotLayer,HexagonLayer,HeatmapLayer,GridLayer,ArcLayer,LineLayer,PathLayer,GeoJsonLayer,ColumnLayer,...} + default;standalone dist.min.js 为 UMD 暴露全局 'deck'。@deck.gl/core DeckProps:parent?:HTMLDivElement|null、canvas?:HTMLCanvasElement|string|null、initialViewState、controller、layers、getTooltip 均真实。globalDomMutation=yes:实测 core +esm 源码 '(t.parent||document.body).appendChild(e)'——不传 parent 则 canvas 挂 body,传 parent 收进容器(shadow 内容器即可)。globalStyleInjection=conditional:@deck.gl/core +esm grep document.head/insertRule/.css = 0(核心 Deck 不注样式);仅 @deck.gl/widgets(opt-in,默认不引)才注 widget CSS。globalEvents=yes:dist UMD grep addEventListener×12 / pointermove×6 / ResizeObserver×1(交互与自适应,挂 canvas/容器,finalize()/setProps 清理)。shadowCompatible=conditional:传 parent 进 shadow 即可将 canvas 与拾取全收进 shadow。
